parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Filter files by ownership or access level

parameters.name: mime_type
parameters.description: Filter by precise document mime-type classification

parameters.name: created_from
parameters.description: Filter for files created on or after this UTC timestamp

parameters.name: created_to
parameters.description: Filter for files created on or before this UTC timestamp

parameters.name: updated_from
parameters.description: Filter for files updated on or after this UTC timestamp

parameters.name: updated_to
parameters.description: Filter for files updated on or before this UTC timestamp

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search term to partially match against file names

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Database column to sort the results by

parameters.name: page_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of files to return per page

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor token obtained from the previous response
